name: Cornmeal Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the chiles and cilantro. Add the eggs, water, milk, salt, baking powder, cornmeal, flour, sugar, and oil. Blend until smooth.
2. Let the batter rest at room temperature for 30 minutes to 1 hour.
3. Heat an 8 to 9 inch well-seasoned crepe pan or small skillet over medium heat. Coat with a little vegetable oil.
4. When the pan is hot, pour in about 2 to 3 ounces of the crepe batter.
5. Tilt the pan and rotate it so the batter is evenly distributed.
6. Cook until the crepe appears dry, then turn and cook on the other side.
7. Repeat with remaining batter.
8. Store the crepes
